news.title:
Geojit upgrades Tata Elxsi to 'Buy', predicting 22% upside with a target price of ₹5,135 driven by strong transportation growth.
Tata Elxsi expects recovery in Q4FY26, leveraging SDV deals, offshore execution, and GenAI-led offerings; focus on niche hiring.
news.summary:
Geojit upgrades Tata Elxsi to 'Buy', predicting 22% upside with a target price of ₹5,135 driven by strong transportation growth.
Tata Elxsi expects recovery in Q4FY26, leveraging SDV deals, offshore execution, and GenAI-led offerings; focus on niche hiring.

news.title: Tata Elxsi management indicates JLR delayed optional spending due to reduced luxury car demand in the Middle East.
news.summary: Tata Elxsi management indicates JLR delayed optional spending due to reduced luxury car demand in the Middle East.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi, IOB, AB Fashion, Bank of Maharashtra, and Voda Idea led midcap gains.
NSE advance-decline ratio was recorded at 3:2 at market close.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi, IOB, AB Fashion, Bank of Maharashtra, and Voda Idea led midcap gains.

news.title:
HDFC Bank CEO addressed chairman's sudden exit; shares fell 5%, down 13% in a month.
NTPC, Tata Elxsi, Nestlé India, and TCS signed MoUs, expanded facilities, and launched initiatives.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank CEO addressed chairman's sudden exit; shares fell 5%, down 13% in a month.
NTPC, Tata Elxsi, Nestlé India, and TCS signed MoUs, expanded facilities, and launched initiatives.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi launched an ODC for Terumo Corp, focusing on cardiac and vascular solutions.
The center integrates AI and GenAI for innovation, supporting global medical device adaptation.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launched an ODC for Terumo Corp, focusing on cardiac and vascular solutions.
The center integrates AI and GenAI for innovation, supporting global medical device adaptation.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi launches Global Offshore Development Center for Terumo Corp.
The center aims to boost collaboration and innovation in healthcare tech.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launches Global Offshore Development Center for Terumo Corp.
The center aims to boost collaboration and innovation in healthcare tech.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi received an IT Assessment Order for AY 2023-24 under section 143(3).
Rs.178.62 lakh demand raised; company to appeal, deeming the order unsustainable.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi received an IT Assessment Order for AY 2023-24 under section 143(3).
Rs.178.62 lakh demand raised; company to appeal, deeming the order unsustainable.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai, a multi-agent platform for Generative AI.
The platform aligns with ASPICE and aims to enhance automotive development processes.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai, a multi-agent platform for Generative AI.
The platform aligns with ASPICE and aims to enhance automotive development processes.

news.title:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.
news.summary:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.

news.title:
India mandates ADAS & DDAWS in commercial vehicles by 2027, boosting demand for safety tech & software.
Stocks like Bosch, Pricol, Tata Elxsi, and Sterling Tools to benefit from increased ADAS integration needs.
news.summary:
India mandates ADAS & DDAWS in commercial vehicles by 2027, boosting demand for safety tech & software.
Stocks like Bosch, Pricol, Tata Elxsi, and Sterling Tools to benefit from increased ADAS integration needs.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi reported 3.2% QoQ growth driven by volume and better margins.
Transportation grew 7.7% QoQ; Media & Communication fell 0.3% due to seasonality.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi reported 3.2% QoQ growth driven by volume and better margins.
Transportation grew 7.7% QoQ; Media & Communication fell 0.3% due to seasonality.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi targets raising utilization from 75% to 80-85% before adding major capacity.
The company aims to restore previous margin levels by the end of next year.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi targets raising utilization from 75% to 80-85% before adding major capacity.
The company aims to restore previous margin levels by the end of next year.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi targets double-digit growth in transportation and healthcare by FY27.
The growth target was discussed in their recent concall update.
news.summary:

news.title:
Key stocks in focus: ICICI Lombard, Tata Elxsi, Endurance Technologies, NLC India, Paytm, Just Dial, Infosys, and Indian Overseas Bank.
ICICI Lombard Q3 net profit down 9.1% at Rs. 659 crore; Tata Elxsi EBIT up 17.4% QoQ; Just Dial revenue up 0.9% QoQ.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Elxsi reported a 3.2% QoQ CC revenue growth in Q3FY26, beating estimates.
Motilal Oswal maintains 'Sell' on Tata Elxsi citing 19% downside due to high valuations and uneven growth.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi reported a 3.2% QoQ CC revenue growth in Q3FY26, beating estimates.
Motilal Oswal maintains 'Sell' on Tata Elxsi citing 19% downside due to high valuations and uneven growth.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard's Q3 profits missed expectations with pressured operations.
Tata Elxsi and ICICI Lombard had contrasting results; traders advised caution.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard's Q3 profits missed expectations with pressured operations.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi cites seasonal furloughs and delayed deals affecting media, communications, and healthcare.
The company anticipates recovery and growth in Q4 of this financial year.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Elxsi's Q3 net profit drops 29.6% to ₹109 Cr; revenue rises 3.8% to ₹953.5 Cr.
EBIT grows 17.7% to ₹199.9 Cr; margin improves to 21% from 18.5%.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi's Q3 net profit drops 29.6% to ₹109 Cr; revenue rises 3.8% to ₹953.5 Cr.
EBIT grows 17.7% to ₹199.9 Cr; margin improves to 21% from 18.5%.
